title: LegenVD
description:
Magic the Gathering strategy videos with a focus on the digital Magic Arena.
This channel is supported by its fans on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

videos.title: There's a new format to explore.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a blue/red or Izzet Indomitable Creativity combo deck, featuring Worldspine Wurm and Xenagos, God of Revels in Explorer.

videos.title: The most criminal deck in Standard.
videos.description:
